1→"""Candidate search module for Boss直聘.
     2→
     3→Handles searching for candidates on Boss直聘's talent search pages:
     4→- Search page: /web/chat/search (搜索候选人)
     5→- Job list: /web/chat/job/list (职位管理)
     6→
     7→Uses page.evaluate() for JavaScript-based DOM extraction rather than
     8→CSS selectors for better reliability against page structure changes.
     9→"""
    10→
    11→import asyncio
    12→import hashlib
    13→from dataclasses import dataclass
    14→from typing import List, Optional, Set
    15→from urllib.parse import urlencode
    16→
    17→from patchright.async_api import Page
    18→from loguru import logger
    19→from rich.console import Console
    20→from rich.table import Table
    21→
    22→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    23→from src.core.anti_detection import human_scroll
    24→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    25→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    26→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    27→from src.models.database import Candidate, SearchHistory, get_db_manager
    28→console = Console()

    30→
    31→@dataclass
    32→class CandidateBasic:
    33→    """Basic candidate info extracted from search results."""
    34→    boss_id: str
    35→    name: str
    36→    title: str
    37→    company: str
    38→    location: Optional[str] = None
    39→    salary_expect: Optional[str] = None
    40→    work_years: Optional[str] = None
    41→    education_level: Optional[str] = None
    42→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
    43→
    44→    def __hash__(self):
    45→        return hash(self.boss_id)
    46→
    47→    def __eq__(self, other):
    48→        if isinstance(other, CandidateBasic):
    49→            return self.boss_id == other.boss_id
    50→        return False
    51→
    52→
    53→# Non-R&D roles to filter out
    54→NON_RD_KEYWORDS = {
    55→    "销售", "产品经理", "市场", "运营", "行政", "人事", "财务",
    56→    "法务", "采购", "客服", "前台", "助理", "秘书",
    57→}
    58→
    59→
    60→def _is_non_rd_role(title: str) -> bool:
    61→    """Check if title indicates a non-R&D role."""
    62→    if not title:
    63→        return False
    64→    for keyword in NON_RD_KEYWORDS:
    65→        if keyword in title:
    66→            return True
    67→    return False
    68→
    69→
    70→def _generate_boss_id(name: str, company: str) -> str:
    71→    """Generate a fallback Boss ID from name + company hash.
    72→
    73→    Uses SHA-256 with 20 hex chars to reduce collision probability
    74→    compared to MD5 with 12 chars.
    75→    """
    76→    raw = f"{name}_{company}"
    77→    h = hashlib.sha256(raw.encode()).hexdigest()[:20]
    78→    return f"zp_{h}"
    79→
    80→
    81→# JavaScript extraction function for Boss直聘 search results page
    82→EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS = """
    83→() => {
    84→    const candidates = [];
    85→
    86→    // Strategy 1: Look for candidate cards in search results
    87→    // Boss直聘 search result cards typically have geek info containers
    88→    const cards = document.querySelectorAll(
    89→        '[class*="card-inner"], [class*="geek-card"], [class*="candidate-card"], ' +
    90→        '[class*="recommend-card"], [class*="job-card-wrap"], [class*="user-item"]'
    91→    );
    92→
    93→    for (const card of cards) {
    94→        try {
    95→            // Extract name
    96→            const nameEl = card.querySelector(
    97→                '[class*="name"], [class*="geek-name"], h3, [class*="username"]'
    98→            );
    99→            const name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   100→
   101→            if (!name || name.length > 20) continue;
   102→
   103→            // Extract title/position
   104→            const titleEl = card.querySelector(
   105→                '[class*="title"], [class*="position"], [class*="expect-position"], ' +
   106→                '[class*="job-title"]'
   107→            );
   108→            const title = titleEl ? titleEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   109→
   110→            // Extract company
   111→            const companyEl = card.querySelector(
   112→                '[class*="company"], [class*="comp-name"]'
   113→            );
   114→            const company = companyEl ? companyEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   115→
   116→            // Extract location
   117→            const locationEl = card.querySelector(
   118→                '[class*="area"], [class*="location"], [class*="city"]'
   119→            );
   120→            const location = locationEl ? locationEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   121→
   122→            // Extract salary expectation
   123→            const salaryEl = card.querySelector(
   124→                '[class*="salary"], [class*="expect-salary"]'
   125→            );
   126→            const salary = salaryEl ? salaryEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   127→
   128→            // Extract work years
   129→            const yearsEl = card.querySelector(
   130→                '[class*="work-year"], [class*="experience"]'
   131→            );
   132→            const workYears = yearsEl ? yearsEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   133→
   134→            // Extract education
   135→            const eduEl = card.querySelector(
   136→                '[class*="education"], [class*="degree"], [class*="edu"]'
   137→            );
   138→            const education = eduEl ? eduEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   139→
   140→            // Try to extract profile URL and encrypted geek ID
   141→            let profileUrl = '';
   142→            let bossId = '';
   143→
   144→            // Check for links in the card
   145→            const link = card.querySelector('a[href*="/web/geek/"], a[href*="geek"], a[href*="resume"]');
   146→            if (link) {
   147→                profileUrl = link.href;
   148→                // Try to extract encryptGeekId from URL
   149→                const match = profileUrl.match(/\\/web\\/geek\\/([^?/]+)/);
   150→                if (match) {
   151→                    bossId = 'zp_' + match[1];
   152→                }
   153→            }
   154→
   155→            // Fallback: check data attributes
   156→            if (!bossId) {
   157→                const dataId = card.getAttribute('data-geekid') ||
   158→                               card.getAttribute('data-uid') ||
   159→                               card.getAttribute('data-id') ||
   160→                               card.getAttribute('data-encrypt-id');
   161→                if (dataId) {
   162→                    bossId = 'zp_' + dataId;
   163→                }
   164→            }
   165→
   166→            // Fallback: check card onclick or inner links for IDs
   167→            if (!bossId) {
   168→                const allLinks = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
   169→                for (const a of allLinks) {
   170→                    const href = a.href;
   171→                    const match = href.match(/encryptGeekId=([^&]+)/);
   172→                    if (match) {
   173→                        bossId = 'zp_' + match[1];
   174→                        if (!profileUrl) profileUrl = href;
   175→                        break;
   176→                    }
   177→                }
   178→            }
   179→
   180→            candidates.push({
   181→                boss_id: bossId,
   182→                name: name,
   183→                title: title,
   184→                company: company,
   185→                location: location,
   186→                salary_expect: salary,
   187→                work_years: workYears,
   188→                education_level: education,
   189→                profile_url: profileUrl
   190→            });
   191→        } catch (e) {
   192→            console.error('Error extracting candidate:', e);
   193→        }
   194→    }
   195→
   196→    // Strategy 2: If no cards found, try extracting from list items
   197→    if (candidates.length === 0) {
   198→        const listItems = document.querySelectorAll(
   199→            '[class*="geek-list"] > *, [class*="resume-list"] > *, ' +
   200→            '[class*="talent-list"] > *, [class*="recommend-list"] > *'
   201→        );
   202→
   203→        for (const item of listItems) {
   204→            try {
   205→                const text = item.innerText || '';
   206→                const lines = text.split('\\n').filter(l => l.trim());
   207→                if (lines.length < 2) continue;
   208→
   209→                const name = lines[0].trim();
   210→                if (!name || name.length > 20) continue;
   211→
   212→                const title = lines.length > 1 ? lines[1].trim() : '';
   213→                const company = lines.length > 2 ? lines[2].trim() : '';
   214→
   215→                let bossId = '';
   216→                const link = item.querySelector('a[href]');
   217→                if (link) {
   218→                    const match = link.href.match(/\\/web\\/geek\\/([^?/]+)/);
   219→                    if (match) bossId = 'zp_' + match[1];
   220→                }
   221→
   222→                candidates.push({
   223→                    boss_id: bossId,
   224→                    name: name,
   225→                    title: title,
   226→                    company: company,
   227→                    location: '',
   228→                    salary_expect: '',
   229→                    work_years: '',
   230→                    education_level: '',
   231→                    profile_url: link ? link.href : ''
   232→                });
   233→            } catch (e) {
   234→                continue;
   235→            }
   236→        }
   237→    }
   238→
   239→    return candidates;
   240→}
   241→"""
   242→
   243→
   244→async def search_candidates(
   245→    keywords: List[str],
   246→    location: Optional[str] = None,
   247→    max_pages: int = 1,
   248→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   249→    education: Optional[str] = None,
   250→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   251→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   252→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   253→    """
   254→    Search for candidates on Boss直聘.
   255→
   256→    Supports multi-keyword search with deduplication.
   257→
   258→    Args:
   259→        keywords: List of search keywords
   260→        location: Location filter (e.g., "北京")
   261→        max_pages: Maximum number of pages to scrape per keyword
   262→        experience: Experience filter (e.g., "3-5年")
   263→        education: Education filter (e.g., "本科")
   264→        salary: Salary filter (e.g., "20-40K")
   265→        browser: Browser manager instance
   266→
   267→    Returns:
   268→        List of CandidateBasic instances
   269→    """
   270→    if browser is None:
   271→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   272→
   273→    page = browser.page
   274→    if not page:
   275→        page = await browser.start()
   276→
   277→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   278→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   279→
   280→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   281→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   282→
   283→    for keyword in keywords:
   284→        console.print(f"\n[cyan]Searching for: {keyword}[/cyan]")
   285→
   286→        # Rate limit check
   287→        await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   288→
   289→        try:
   290→            # Navigate to search page
   291→            search_url = _build_search_url(keyword, location, 1, experience, education, salary)
   292→            await page.goto(search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   293→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   294→
   295→            # Check for captcha
   296→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   297→
   298→            # Check for quota exhaustion page
   299→            if await _check_quota_exhausted(page):
   300→                console.print("[red]Daily contact quota exhausted. Stopping search.[/red]")
   301→                break
   302→
   303→            # Boss直聘 uses infinite scroll (auto-load on scroll), no pagination buttons.
   304→            # Scroll multiple rounds to load more candidates.
   305→            # max_pages controls how many scroll rounds to perform.
   306→            for scroll_round in range(1, max_pages + 1):
   307→                console.print(f"  [dim]Scroll round {scroll_round}/{max_pages}...[/dim]")
   308→
   309→                # Scroll within the content container to trigger auto-load.
   310→                # The page uses an inner scrollable container, not window scroll.
   311→                await _scroll_search_results(page)
   312→                await async_random_delay('scroll')
   313→
   314→            # Extract candidates via JavaScript after all scrolling is done
   315→            raw_candidates = await page.evaluate(EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS)
   316→
   317→            if not raw_candidates:
   318→                logger.warning(f"No candidates found for '{keyword}'")
   319→                continue
   320→
   321→            # Process results
   322→            page_count = 0
   323→            for raw in raw_candidates:
   324→                name = raw.get('name', '').strip()
   325→                title = raw.get('title', '').strip()
   326→                company = raw.get('company', '').strip()
   327→
   328→                if not name:
   329→                    continue
   330→
   331→                # Filter non-R&D roles
   332→                if _is_non_rd_role(title):
   333→                    continue
   334→
   335→                # Generate or use boss_id
   336→                boss_id = raw.get('boss_id', '')
   337→                if not boss_id:
   338→                    boss_id = _generate_boss_id(name, company)
   339→
   340→                # Deduplicate
   341→                if boss_id in seen_ids:
   342→                    continue
   343→
   344→                # Also check name+company dedup
   345→                dedup_key = f"{name}_{company}"
   346→                if dedup_key in seen_ids:
   347→                    continue
   348→
   349→                seen_ids.add(boss_id)
   350→                seen_ids.add(dedup_key)
   351→
   352→                candidate = CandidateBasic(
   353→                    boss_id=boss_id,
   354→                    name=name,
   355→                    title=title,
   356→                    company=company,
   357→                    location=raw.get('location', ''),
   358→                    salary_expect=raw.get('salary_expect', ''),
   359→                    work_years=raw.get('work_years', ''),
   360→                    education_level=raw.get('education_level', ''),
   361→                    profile_url=raw.get('profile_url', ''),
   362→                )
   363→
   364→                all_candidates.append(candidate)
   365→                page_count += 1
   366→
   367→            # Log action
   368→            rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   369→                'keyword': keyword,
   370→                'scroll_rounds': max_pages,
   371→                'results': page_count,
   372→            })
   373→
   374→            console.print(f"  [green]Found {page_count} candidates for '{keyword}'[/green]")
   375→
   376→            # Save search history
   377→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   378→                history = SearchHistory(
   379→                    criteria={
   380→                        'keywords': keyword,
   381→                        'location': location,
   382→                        'scroll_rounds': max_pages,
   383→                        'experience': experience,
   384→                        'education': education,
   385→                        'salary': salary,
   386→                    },
   387→                    results_count=page_count,
   388→                )
   389→                session.add(history)
   390→
   391→        except Exception as e:
   392→            logger.error(f"Error searching for '{keyword}': {e}")
   393→            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   394→
   395→    # Save candidates to database
   396→    _save_candidates_to_db(all_candidates, keywords, db_manager)
   397→
   398→    # Display results summary
   399→    _display_results(all_candidates, keywords)
   400→
   401→    return all_candidates
   402→
   403→
   404→def _build_search_url(
   405→    keyword: str,
   406→    location: Optional[str] = None,
   407→    page: int = 1,
   408→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   409→    education: Optional[str] = None,
   410→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   411→) -> str:
   412→    """Build Boss直聘 search URL with query parameters."""
   413→    base_url = "https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search"
   414→
   415→    params = {"query": keyword}
   416→
   417→    if location:
   418→        params["city"] = location
   419→
   420→    if page > 1:
   421→        params["page"] = str(page)
   422→
   423→    if experience:
   424→        params["experience"] = experience
   425→
   426→    if education:
   427→        params["degree"] = education
   428→
   429→    if salary:
   430→        params["salary"] = salary
   431→
   432→    url = f"{base_url}?{urlencode(params)}"
   433→    return url
   434→
   435→
   436→async def _scroll_search_results(page: Page) -> None:
   437→    """
   438→    Scroll the search results container to trigger auto-load.
   439→
   440→    Boss直聘 uses infinite scroll within an inner container,
   441→    not window-level scroll. We scroll the container or fall back
   442→    to keyboard-based scrolling.
   443→    """
   444→    # Try scrolling within the candidate list container
   445→    scrolled = await page.evaluate("""
   446→        () => {
   447→            // Find the scrollable container for search results
   448→            const containers = document.querySelectorAll(
   449→                '[class*="recommend-list"], [class*="geek-list"], [class*="search-result"],
   450→                 [class*="candidate-list"], [class*="card-list"], [class*="scroll-container"]'
   451→            );
   452→            for (const c of containers) {
   453→                if (c.scrollHeight > c.clientHeight) {
   454→                    c.scrollTop += 600;
   455→                    return true;
   456→                }
   457→            }
   458→
   459→            // Fallback: find any large scrollable div
   460→            const allDivs = document.querySelectorAll('div');
   461→            for (const d of allDivs) {
   462→                if (d.scrollHeight > d.clientHeight + 100 && d.clientHeight > 300) {
   463→                    d.scrollTop += 600;
   464→                    return true;
   465→                }
   466→            }
   467→
   468→            return false;
   469→        }
   470→    """)
   471→
   472→    if not scrolled:
   473→        # Final fallback: use keyboard Page Down
   474→        await page.keyboard.press('PageDown')
   475→        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
   476→        await page.keyboard.press('PageDown')
   477→
   478→    # Wait for new content to load
   479→    await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
   480→
   481→
   482→async def _check_quota_exhausted(page: Page) -> bool:
   483→    """Check if Boss直聘 shows a quota exhaustion page."""
   484→    try:
   485→        result = await page.evaluate("""
   486→            () => {
   487→                const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   488→                const quotaIndicators = [
   489→                    '今日沟通次数已用完',
   490→                    '沟通次数已达上限',
   491→                    '今日联系人数已满',
   492→                    '升级会员',
   493→                    '开通会员享更多沟通'
   494→                ];
   495→                for (const indicator of quotaIndicators) {
   496→                    if (bodyText.includes(indicator)) {
   497→                        return true;
   498→                    }
   499→                }
   500→                return false;
   501→            }
   502→        """)
   503→        return result
   504→    except Exception:
   505→        return False
   506→
   507→
   508→def _save_candidates_to_db(
   509→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   510→    keywords: List[str],
   511→    db_manager,
   512→) -> None:
   513→    """Save or update candidates in the database."""
   514→    source = ', '.join(keywords)
   515→
   516→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   517→        # Batch-fetch existing candidates to avoid N+1 queries
   518→        boss_ids = [c.boss_id for c in candidates]
   519→        existing_map = {}
   520→        # Query in chunks of 500 to avoid SQLite variable limit
   521→        for i in range(0, len(boss_ids), 500):
   522→            chunk = boss_ids[i:i + 500]
   523→            rows = session.query(Candidate).filter(
   524→                Candidate.boss_id.in_(chunk)
   525→            ).all()
   526→            for row in rows:
   527→                existing_map[row.boss_id] = row
   528→
   529→        for c in candidates:
   530→            existing = existing_map.get(c.boss_id)
   531→            if existing:
   532→                existing.name = c.name or existing.name
   533→                existing.title = c.title or existing.title
   534→                existing.company = c.company or existing.company
   535→                existing.location = c.location or existing.location
   536→                existing.salary_expect = c.salary_expect or existing.salary_expect
   537→                existing.work_years = c.work_years or existing.work_years
   538→                existing.education_level = c.education_level or existing.education_level
   539→                existing.profile_url = c.profile_url or existing.profile_url
   540→                if source and source not in (existing.source_search or ''):
   541→                    existing.source_search = f"{existing.source_search or ''}, {source}".strip(', ')
   542→            else:
   543→                new_candidate = Candidate(
   544→                    boss_id=c.boss_id,
   545→                    name=c.name,
   546→                    title=c.title,
   547→                    company=c.company,
   548→                    location=c.location,
   549→                    salary_expect=c.salary_expect,
   550→                    work_years=c.work_years,
   551→                    education_level=c.education_level,
   552→                    profile_url=c.profile_url,
   553→                    source_search=source,
   554→                )
   555→                session.add(new_candidate)
   556→
   557→
   558→def _display_results(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], keywords: List[str]) -> None:
   559→    """Display search results in a Rich table."""
   560→    if not candidates:
   561→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found.[/yellow]")
   562→        return
   563→
   564→    table = Table(title=f"Search Results ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   565→    table.add_column("Boss ID", style="dim", max_width=20)
   566→    table.add_column("Name", style="bold")
   567→    table.add_column("Title")
   568→    table.add_column("Company")
   569→    table.add_column("Location")
   570→    table.add_column("Salary Expect")
   571→    table.add_column("Experience")
   572→    table.add_column("Education")
   573→
   574→    for c in candidates[:50]:  # Show max 50 in table
   575→        table.add_row(
   576→            c.boss_id[:20],
   577→            c.name,
   578→            c.title[:30] if c.title else "",
   579→            c.company[:20] if c.company else "",
   580→            c.location or "",
   581→            c.salary_expect or "",
   582→            c.work_years or "",
   583→            c.education_level or "",
   584→        )
   585→
   586→    console.print(table)
   587→
   588→    if len(candidates) > 50:
   589→        console.print(f"[dim]...and {len(candidates) - 50} more candidates[/dim]")
   590→

1→"""Export module for exporting candidate data.
     2→
     3→Supports Excel (.xlsx) and CSV formats with optional
     4→message history inclusion.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→from datetime import datetime
     8→from pathlib import Path
     9→from typing import Optional, Literal, List, Dict, Any
    10→
    11→import pandas as pd
    12→from openpyxl import Workbook
    13→from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
    14→from openpyxl.utils.dataframe import dataframe_to_rows
    15→from loguru import logger

    23→
    24→def export_candidates(
    25→    format: Literal["excel", "xlsx", "csv"] = "excel",
    26→    output_path: Optional[str] = None,
    27→    include_messages: bool = True
    28→) -> str:
    29→    """
    30→    Export candidate data to Excel or CSV.
    31→

file.content:
"""Export module for exporting candidate data.

Supports Excel (.xlsx) and CSV formats with optional
message history inclusion.
"""

from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Optional, Literal, List, Dict, Any

import pandas as pd
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
from openpyxl.utils.dataframe import dataframe_to_rows
from loguru import logger
from rich.console import Console

from src.utils.config import get_config
from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager

console = Console()


def export_candidates(
    format: Literal["excel", "xlsx", "csv"] = "excel",
    output_path: Optional[str] = None,
    include_messages: bool = True
) -> str:
    """
    Export candidate data to Excel or CSV.

    Args:
        format: Export format ('excel', 'xlsx', or 'csv')
        output_path: Output file path (auto-generated if None)
        include_messages: Include message history

    Returns:
        Path to exported file
    """
    config = get_config()
    db_manager = get_db_manager()

    if format == "xlsx":
        format = "excel"

    if output_path is None:
        export_dir = Path(config.get('data.export_dir', 'data/exports'))
        export_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
        extension = 'xlsx' if format == 'excel' else 'csv'
        output_path = str(export_dir / f"candidates_{timestamp}.{extension}")

    Path(output_path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    candidates_data = _get_candidates_data(db_manager, include_messages)

    if not candidates_data:
        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to export[/yellow]")
        return ""

    df = _create_dataframe(candidates_data)

    if format == "excel":
        _export_to_excel(df, output_path)
    else:
        _export_to_csv(df, output_path)

    console.print(f"[green]Exported {len(candidates_data)} candidates to: {output_path}[/green]")
    return output_path


def _get_candidates_data(db_manager, include_messages: bool) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    """Get candidate data from database."""
    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
        candidates = session.query(Candidate).all()

        data = []
        for candidate in candidates:
            record = {
                'boss_id': candidate.boss_id,
                'name': candidate.name,
                'title': candidate.title,
                'company': candidate.company,
                'location': candidate.location,
                'salary_expect': candidate.salary_expect,
                'work_years': candidate.work_years,
                'education_level': candidate.education_level,
                'profile_url': candidate.profile_url,
                'first_seen': candidate.first_seen,
                'last_updated': candidate.last_updated,
                'source_search': candidate.source_search,
            }

            # Flatten education
            education = candidate.education or []
            if education:
                latest_edu = education[0]
                record['latest_education'] = _format_education(latest_edu)
            else:
                record['latest_education'] = ''

            # Flatten work experience
            work_exp = candidate.work_experience or []
            if work_exp:
                latest_work = work_exp[0]
                record['latest_experience'] = _format_work_experience(latest_work)
            else:
                record['latest_experience'] = ''

            # Format skills
            skills = candidate.skills or []
            record['skills'] = ', '.join(skills) if skills else ''

            data.append(record)

        # Batch-fetch message info to avoid N+1 queries
        if include_messages and data:
            from sqlalchemy import func

            boss_ids = [r['boss_id'] for r in data]
            # Get message counts and latest message per candidate in bulk
            msg_counts = {}
            latest_msgs = {}

            # Count messages per candidate
            count_rows = session.query(
                Message.candidate_boss_id,
                func.count(Message.id).label('cnt')
            ).filter(
                Message.candidate_boss_id.in_(boss_ids)
            ).group_by(Message.candidate_boss_id).all()

            for row in count_rows:
                msg_counts[row.candidate_boss_id] = row.cnt

            # Get latest message per candidate using a subquery
            from sqlalchemy import desc
            all_msgs = session.query(Message).filter(
                Message.candidate_boss_id.in_(boss_ids)
            ).order_by(Message.candidate_boss_id, desc(Message.created_at)).all()

            for msg in all_msgs:
                if msg.candidate_boss_id not in latest_msgs:
                    latest_msgs[msg.candidate_boss_id] = msg

            for record in data:
                bid = record['boss_id']
                record['message_count'] = msg_counts.get(bid, 0)
                latest_msg = latest_msgs.get(bid)
                if latest_msg:
                    record['last_message_status'] = latest_msg.status
                    record['last_message_date'] = latest_msg.sent_at or latest_msg.created_at
                    record['last_message_template'] = latest_msg.template_name
                else:
                    record['last_message_status'] = ''
                    record['last_message_date'] = None
                    record['last_message_template'] = ''

        return data


def _format_education(edu: Dict) -> str:
    """Format education entry as string."""
    parts = []
    if edu.get('school'):
        parts.append(edu['school'])
    if edu.get('degree'):
        parts.append(edu['degree'])
    if edu.get('major'):
        parts.append(edu['major'])
    return ' - '.join(parts) if parts else ''


def _format_work_experience(work: Dict) -> str:
    """Format work experience entry as string."""
    parts = []
    if work.get('title'):
        parts.append(work['title'])
    if work.get('company'):
        parts.append(f"@ {work['company']}")
    return ' '.join(parts) if parts else ''


def _create_dataframe(data: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Create pandas DataFrame from candidate data."""
    columns = [
        'boss_id',
        'name',
        'title',
        'company',
        'location',
        'salary_expect',
        'work_years',
        'education_level',
        'latest_education',
        'latest_experience',
        'skills',
        'profile_url',
        'source_search',
        'first_seen',
        'last_updated',
    ]

    if data and 'message_count' in data[0]:
        columns.extend([
            'message_count',
            'last_message_status',
            'last_message_date',
            'last_message_template',
        ])

    df = pd.DataFrame(data)

    existing_columns = [c for c in columns if c in df.columns]
    df = df[existing_columns]

    datetime_columns = ['first_seen', 'last_updated', 'last_message_date']
    for col in datetime_columns:
        if col in df.columns:
            df[col] = pd.to_datetime(df[col]).dt.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')

    return df


def _export_to_excel(df: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str) -> None:
    """Export DataFrame to Excel with formatting."""
    wb = Workbook()
    ws = wb.active
    ws.title = "Candidates"

    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
    header_alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True)

    border = Border(
        left=Side(style='thin'),
        right=Side(style='thin'),
        top=Side(style='thin'),
        bottom=Side(style='thin')
    )

    for r_idx, row in enumerate(dataframe_to_rows(df, index=False, header=True), 1):
        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row, 1):
            cell = ws.cell(row=r_idx, column=c_idx, value=value)
            cell.border = border

            if r_idx == 1:
                cell.font = header_font
                cell.fill = header_fill
                cell.alignment = header_alignment
            else:
                cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)

    column_widths = {
        'A': 20,  # boss_id
        'B': 12,  # name
        'C': 25,  # title
        'D': 20,  # company
        'E': 12,  # location
        'F': 15,  # salary_expect
        'G': 12,  # work_years
        'H': 12,  # education_level
        'I': 30,  # latest_education
        'J': 30,  # latest_experience
        'K': 40,  # skills
        'L': 40,  # profile_url
        'M': 20,  # source_search
        'N': 18,  # first_seen
        'O': 18,  # last_updated
        'P': 12,  # message_count
        'Q': 15,  # last_message_status
        'R': 18,  # last_message_date
        'S': 15,  # last_message_template
    }

    for col, width in column_widths.items():
        ws.column_dimensions[col].width = width

    ws.freeze_panes = 'A2'
    ws.auto_filter.ref = ws.dimensions

    wb.save(output_path)
    logger.info(f"Excel file saved to: {output_path}")


def _export_to_csv(df: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str) -> None:
    """Export DataFrame to CSV."""
    df.to_csv(output_path, index=False, encoding='utf-8-sig')
    logger.info(f"CSV file saved to: {output_path}")

1→"""Pipeline checkpoint manager for resume capability."""
     2→
     3→import json
     4→import os
     5→import tempfile
     6→from datetime import datetime, timezone
     7→from pathlib import Path
     8→from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Set
     9→
    10→from loguru import logger
    11→
    12→
    13→CHECKPOINT_DIR = Path("data/.checkpoints")
    14→
    15→
    16→class CheckpointManager:
    17→    """Manages pipeline checkpoint save/load for resume support."""
    18→
    19→    def __init__(self, checkpoint_id: Optional[str] = None):
    20→        CHECKPOINT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    21→
    22→        if checkpoint_id:
    23→            self.checkpoint_path = CHECKPOINT_DIR / f"{checkpoint_id}.json"
    24→        else:
    25→            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    26→            self.checkpoint_path = CHECKPOINT_DIR / f"pipeline_{ts}.json"
    27→
    28→        self._data: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    29→
    30→    def save(
    31→        self,
    32→        keywords: tuple,
    33→        template: str,
    34→        variables: dict,
    35→        company: tuple,
    36→        location: Optional[str],
    37→        max_pages: int,
    38→        batch_pages: int,
    39→        skip_messaged: bool,
    40→        interactive: bool,
    41→        completed_pages: int,
    42→        sent_ids: List[str],
    43→        seen_ids: List[str],
    44→        total_results: Optional[dict] = None,
    45→        mode: str = "recommend",
    46→        dry_run: bool = False,
    47→    ) -> None:
    48→        self._data = {
    49→            "created_at": self._data.get("created_at", datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()),
    50→            "updated_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    51→            "params": {
    52→                "keywords": list(keywords),
    53→                "template": template,
    54→                "variables": variables,
    55→                "company": list(company) if company else [],
    56→                "location": location,
    57→                "max_pages": max_pages,
    58→                "batch_pages": batch_pages,
    59→                "skip_messaged": skip_messaged,
    60→                "interactive": interactive,
    61→                "mode": mode,
    62→                "dry_run": dry_run,
    63→            },
    64→            "progress": {
    65→                "completed_pages": completed_pages,
    66→                "sent_ids": sent_ids,
    67→                "seen_ids": seen_ids,
    68→                "total_results": total_results or {},
    69→            },
    70→        }
    71→
    72→        try:
    73→            tmp_fd, tmp_path = tempfile.mkstemp(
    74→                dir=self.checkpoint_path.parent, suffix=".tmp"
    75→            )
    76→            try:
    77→                with os.fdopen(tmp_fd, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    78→                    json.dump(self._data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
    79→                os.replace(tmp_path, self.checkpoint_path)
    80→            except BaseException:
    81→                try:
    82→                    os.unlink(tmp_path)
    83→                except OSError:
    84→                    pass
    85→                raise
    86→            logger.debug(f"Checkpoint saved: {self.checkpoint_path}")
    87→        except Exception as e:
    88→            logger.error(f"Failed to save checkpoint: {e}")
    89→            raise
    90→
    91→    @classmethod
    92→    def load_latest(cls) -> Optional["CheckpointManager"]:
    93→        CHECKPOINT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    94→        files = sorted(CHECKPOINT_DIR.glob("pipeline_*.json"), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
    95→
    96→        if not files:
    97→            return None
    98→
    99→        mgr = cls(checkpoint_id="__loading__")
   100→        mgr.checkpoint_path = files[0]
   101→
   102→        try:
   103→            with open(files[0], "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
   104→                mgr._data = json.load(f)
   105→            logger.info(f"Loaded checkpoint: {files[0]}")
   106→            return mgr
   107→        except Exception as e:
   108→            logger.error(f"Failed to load checkpoint: {e}")
   109→            return None
   110→
   111→    @property
   112→    def params(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   113→        return self._data.get("params", {})
   114→
   115→    @property
   116→    def progress(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   117→        return self._data.get("progress", {})
   118→
   119→    @property
   120→    def completed_pages(self) -> int:
   121→        return self.progress.get("completed_pages", 0)
   122→
   123→    @property
   124→    def sent_ids(self) -> List[str]:
   125→        return list(self.progress.get("sent_ids", []))
   126→
   127→    @property
   128→    def seen_ids(self) -> Set[str]:
   129→        return set(self.progress.get("seen_ids", []))
   130→
   131→    @property
   132→    def total_results(self) -> Dict[str, int]:
   133→        return self.progress.get("total_results", {})
   134→
   135→    @property
   136→    def summary(self) -> str:
   137→        p = self.params
   138→        pr = self.progress
   139→        created = self._data.get("created_at", "unknown")
   140→        updated = self._data.get("updated_at", "unknown")
   141→        mode = p.get("mode", "recommend")
   142→        return (
   143→            f"Keywords: {p.get('keywords', [])}\n"
   144→            f"Template: {p.get('template', '')}\n"
   145→            f"Mode: {mode}\n"
   146→            f"Pages completed: {pr.get('completed_pages', 0)} / {p.get('max_pages', '?')}\n"
   147→            f"Candidates seen: {len(pr.get('seen_ids', []))}\n"
   148→            f"Messages sent: {len(pr.get('sent_ids', []))}\n"
   149→            f"Created: {created}\n"
   150→            f"Last updated: {updated}"
   151→        )
   152→
   153→    def delete(self) -> None:
   154→        try:
   155→            if self.checkpoint_path.exists():
   156→                self.checkpoint_path.unlink()
   157→                logger.debug(f"Checkpoint deleted: {self.checkpoint_path}")
   158→        except Exception as e:
   159→            logger.error(f"Failed to delete checkpoint: {e}")
   160→

1→"""Message sending module for Boss直聘.
     2→
     3→Handles sending templated messages to candidates through Boss直聘's
     4→chat system. Supports single and batch message sending with
     5→human confirmation and rate limiting.
     6→
     7→Boss直聘 chat flow:
     8→1. From search page (/web/chat/search), click "搜索畅聊卡" button
     9→2. Click "查看对话" to open the chat window
    10→3. Type message in #boss-chat-global-input
    11→4. Click "发送" button
    12→5. Close chat via div.iboss.iboss-close
    13→
    14→Key differences from Maimai:
    15→- Boss直聘 uses "搜索畅聊卡" as the primary contact action from search
    16→- Chat input is a div with id #boss-chat-global-input (not textarea)
    17→- Chat opens as an overlay on the current page
    18→- Main page URL: /web/chat/search
    19→"""
    20→
    21→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    22→from typing import Dict, List, Optional
    23→
    24→from patchright.async_api import Page
    25→from loguru import logger
    26→from rich.console import Console
    27→from rich.panel import Panel
    28→
    29→import questionary
    30→
    31→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    32→from src.utils.config import get_config
    33→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    34→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    35→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    36→from src.utils.validators import validate_template_variables
    37→from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
    38→from src.exceptions.errors import (
    39→    BrowserError,
    40→    PermanentFailureError,
    41→    SelectorNotFoundError,
    42→)
    43→
    44→console = Console()
    45→
    46→
    47→def render_template(template: Dict, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
    48→    """
    49→    Render a message template with variable substitution.
    50→
    51→    Uses a single-pass approach to avoid recursive replacement issues
    52→    (e.g., variable values containing {other_var} patterns).
    53→
    54→    Args:
    55→        template: Template dict with 'content' and 'variables' keys
    56→        variables: Variable name-value pairs
    57→
    58→    Returns:
    59→        Rendered message string
    60→    """
    61→    import re
    62→
    63→    content = template['content']
    64→
    65→    def replacer(match):
    66→        var_name = match.group(1)
    67→        if var_name in variables:
    68→            return str(variables[var_name])
    69→        return match.group(0)  # Keep original if no matching variable
    70→
    71→    content = re.sub(r'\{(\w+)\}', replacer, content)
    72→    return content
    73→
    74→
    75→async def send_message(
    76→    boss_id: str,
    77→    template_name: str,
    78→    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
    79→    preview_only: bool = False,
    80→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
    81→) -> bool:
    82→    """
    83→    Send a templated message to a candidate on Boss直聘.
    84→
    85→    Args:
    86→        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
    87→        template_name: Name of the message template
    88→        variables: Template variable overrides
    89→        preview_only: If True, only preview the message without sending
    90→        browser: Browser manager instance
    91→
    92→    Returns:
    93→        True if message sent successfully
    94→    """
    95→    if browser is None:
    96→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    97→
    98→    page = browser.page
    99→    if not page:
   100→        page = await browser.start()
   101→
   102→    config = get_config()
   103→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   104→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   105→
   106→    # Load template
   107→    template = config.get_template(template_name)
   108→
   109→    # Merge variables
   110→    final_vars = dict(variables or {})
   111→
   112→    # Try to fill candidate info from database
   113→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   114→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   115→        if candidate:
   116→            if 'name' not in final_vars and candidate.name:
   117→                final_vars['name'] = candidate.name
   118→            if 'company' not in final_vars and candidate.company:
   119→                final_vars['company'] = candidate.company
   120→            if 'position' not in final_vars and candidate.title:
   121→                final_vars['position'] = candidate.title
   122→
   123→    # Validate variables
   124→    validate_template_variables(template, final_vars)
   125→
   126→    # Render message
   127→    message_content = render_template(template, final_vars)
   128→
   129→    # Preview
   130→    console.print(Panel(
   131→        f"[bold]To:[/bold] {boss_id}\n"
   132→        f"[bold]Template:[/bold] {template_name}\n"
   133→        f"[bold]Message:[/bold]\n{message_content}",
   134→        title="Message Preview",
   135→        border_style="cyan"
   136→    ))
   137→
   138→    if preview_only:
   139→        console.print("[dim]Preview only — message not sent.[/dim]")
   140→        return False
   141→
   142→    # Confirm send
   143→    confirm = questionary.confirm(
   144→        "Send this message?",
   145→        default=False,
   146→    ).ask()
   147→
   148→    if not confirm:
   149→        console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled.[/yellow]")
   150→        # Record cancellation
   151→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'cancelled', db_manager)
   152→        return False
   153→
   154→    # Rate limit check
   155→    await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   156→
   157→    try:
   158→        # Navigate to chat with the candidate
   159→        success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   160→        if not success:
   161→            raise BrowserError(f"Failed to open chat with {boss_id}")
   162→
   163→        # Type and send the message
   164→        await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   165→
   166→        # Log success
   167→        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id, 'template': template_name})
   168→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   169→
   170→        console.print(f"[green]Message sent to {boss_id}![/green]")
   171→        return True
   172→
   173→    except PermanentFailureError as e:
   174→        logger.error(f"Permanent failure sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   175→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   176→        console.print(f"[red]Failed to send: {e}[/red]")
   177→        return False
   178→    except Exception as e:
   179→        logger.error(f"Error sending message to {boss_id}: {e}")
   180→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   181→        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   182→        return False
   183→
   184→
   185→async def send_message_batch(
   186→    candidates: list,
   187→    template_name: str,
   188→    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
   189→    interactive: bool = True,
   190→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   191→    dry_run: bool = False,
   192→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   193→) -> Dict[str, int]:
   194→    """
   195→    Send messages to multiple candidates.
   196→
   197→    Args:
   198→        candidates: List of CandidateBasic or dicts with boss_id
   199→        template_name: Template name
   200→        variables: Shared template variables
   201→        interactive: Confirm each message individually
   202→        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged
   203→        dry_run: Simulate without actually sending
   204→        browser: Browser manager instance
   205→
   206→    Returns:
   207→        Dict with counts: sent, failed, skipped, cancelled
   208→    """
   209→    if browser is None:
   210→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   211→
   212→    config = get_config()
   213→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   214→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   215→
   216→    stats = {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   217→
   218→    for i, candidate in enumerate(candidates):
   219→        if isinstance(candidate, dict):
   220→            boss_id = candidate.get('boss_id', '')
   221→            name = candidate.get('name', '')
   222→            title = candidate.get('title', '')
   223→            company = candidate.get('company', '')
   224→        else:
   225→            boss_id = getattr(candidate, 'boss_id', '')
   226→            name = getattr(candidate, 'name', '')
   227→            title = getattr(candidate, 'title', '')
   228→            company = getattr(candidate, 'company', '')
   229→
   230→        if not boss_id:
   231→            stats['skipped'] += 1
   232→            continue
   233→
   234→        console.print(f"\n[cyan]({i+1}/{len(candidates)})[/cyan] {name} - {title} @ {company}")
   235→
   236→        # Check if already messaged
   237→        if skip_messaged:
   238→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   239→                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
   240→                    candidate_boss_id=boss_id, status='sent'
   241→                ).first()
   242→                if existing_msg:
   243→                    console.print(f"  [dim]Already messaged, skipping[/dim]")
   244→                    stats['skipped'] += 1
   245→                    continue
   246→
   247→        if dry_run:
   248→            console.print(f"  [dim]Dry run — would send '{template_name}' template[/dim]")
   249→            stats['sent'] += 1
   250→            continue
   251→
   252→        # Build per-candidate variables
   253→        per_vars = dict(variables or {})
   254→        if name:
   255→            per_vars.setdefault('name', name)
   256→        if company:
   257→            per_vars.setdefault('company', company)
   258→        if title:
   259→            per_vars.setdefault('position', title)
   260→
   261→        try:
   262→            if interactive:
   263→                # Use single send (with preview + confirmation)
   264→                result = await send_message(
   265→                    boss_id=boss_id,
   266→                    template_name=template_name,
   267→                    variables=per_vars,
   268→                    browser=browser,
   269→                )
   270→                if result:
   271→                    stats['sent'] += 1
   272→                else:
   273→                    stats['cancelled'] += 1
   274→            else:
   275→                # Non-interactive: send without confirmation
   276→                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   277→
   278→                template = config.get_template(template_name)
   279→                validate_template_variables(template, per_vars)
   280→                message_content = render_template(template, per_vars)
   281→
   282→                page = browser.page
   283→                success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   284→                if success:
   285→                    await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   286→                    rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   287→                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   288→                    stats['sent'] += 1
   289→                    console.print(f"  [green]Sent![/green]")
   290→                else:
   291→                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   292→                    stats['failed'] += 1
   293→                    console.print(f"  [red]Failed to open chat[/red]")
   294→
   295→        except Exception as e:
   296→            logger.error(f"Error sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   297→            stats['failed'] += 1
   298→            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   299→
   300→        # Delay between messages
   301→        if i < len(candidates) - 1:
   302→            await async_random_delay('message')
   303→
   304→    # Summary
   305→    console.print(Panel(
   306→        f"[green]Sent: {stats['sent']}[/green] | "
   307→        f"[red]Failed: {stats['failed']}[/red] | "
   308→        f"[yellow]Skipped: {stats['skipped']}[/yellow] | "
   309→        f"[dim]Cancelled: {stats['cancelled']}[/dim]",
   310→        title="Batch Message Summary",
   311→    ))
   312→
   313→    return stats
   314→
   315→
   316→async def _navigate_to_chat(page: Page, boss_id: str, db_manager) -> bool:
   317→    """
   318→    Navigate to the chat window for a candidate.
   319→
   320→    Tries multiple strategies:
   321→    1. Direct chat URL (if known)
   322→    2. Navigate to candidate profile and click "立即沟通"
   323→    3. Search in existing conversations
   324→
   325→    Args:
   326→        page: Playwright page instance
   327→        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
   328→        db_manager: Database manager
   329→
   330→    Returns:
   331→        True if chat window is ready
   332→    """
   333→    encrypt_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   334→
   335→    # Get profile URL from database
   336→    profile_url = None
   337→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   338→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   339→        if candidate and candidate.profile_url:
   340→            profile_url = candidate.profile_url
   341→
   342→    # Strategy 1: Navigate to profile and click chat button
   343→    if profile_url:
   344→        try:
   345→            await page.goto(profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   346→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   347→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   348→
   349→            # Look for "立即沟通" button
   350→            chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
   351→            if chat_button:
   352→                await chat_button.click()
   353→                await async_random_delay('action')
   354→                # Wait for chat to load
   355→                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   356→                return True
   357→        except Exception as e:
   358→            logger.warning(f"Strategy 1 (profile click) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   359→
   360→    # Strategy 2: Try direct geek URL
   361→    try:
   362→        geek_url = f"https://www.zhipin.com/web/geek/{encrypt_id}"
   363→        await page.goto(geek_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   364→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   365→        await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   366→
   367→        chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
   368→        if chat_button:
   369→            await chat_button.click()
   370→            await async_random_delay('action')
   371→            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   372→            return True
   373→    except Exception as e:
   374→        logger.warning(f"Strategy 2 (direct geek URL) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   375→
   376→    # Strategy 3: Try to find a chat link on the current page
   377→    try:
   378→        # Check if there's a chat link on the current page
   379→        chat_link = await page.query_selector(
   380→            'a[href*="chat"], a[href*="im"], [class*="chat-link"]'
   381→        )
   382→        if chat_link:
   383→            await chat_link.click()
   384→            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   385→            return True
   386→    except Exception as e:
   387→        logger.warning(f"Strategy 3 (chat link) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   388→
   389→    logger.error(f"All chat navigation strategies failed for {boss_id}")
   390→    return False
   391→
   392→
   393→async def _find_chat_button(page: Page):
   394→    """Find the chat/communication button on the page."""
   395→    selectors = [
   396→        'button:has-text("搜索畅聊卡")',
   397→        'button:has-text("立即沟通")',
   398→        'a:has-text("立即沟通")',
   399→        'button:has-text("开始沟通")',
   400→        'button:has-text("继续沟通")',
   401→        '[class*="btn-chat"]',
   402→        '[class*="chat-btn"]',
   403→    ]
   404→
   405→    for selector in selectors:
   406→        try:
   407→            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
   408→            if element and await element.is_visible():
   409→                return element
   410→        except Exception:
   411→            continue
   412→
   413→    return None
   414→
   415→
   416→async def _type_and_send_message(page: Page, message: str) -> None:
   417→    """
   418→    Type a message into the chat input and send it.
   419→
   420→    Args:
   421→        page: Playwright page instance
   422→        message: Message text to send
   423→    """
   424→    # Find the message input
   425→    # Recording confirmed: #boss-chat-global-input is the primary chat input (a div element)
   426→    input_selectors = [
   427→        '#boss-chat-global-input',
   428→        '[contenteditable="true"]',
   429→        '[class*="chat-input"] textarea',
   430→        '[class*="input-area"] textarea',
   431→        'textarea[class*="message"]',
   432→        'textarea',
   433→    ]
   434→
   435→    input_element = None
   436→    for selector in input_selectors:
   437→        try:
   438→            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
   439→            if element and await element.is_visible():
   440→                input_element = element
   441→                break
   442→        except Exception:
   443→            continue
   444→
   445→    if not input_element:
   446→        raise SelectorNotFoundError("Chat message input not found")
   447→
   448→    # Click to focus
   449→    await input_element.click()
   450→    await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
   451→
   452→    # Clear any existing content (use Meta+a on macOS, Control+a elsewhere)
   453→    import sys
   454→    select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
   455→    await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
   456→    await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
   457→    await page.wait_for_timeout(200)
   458→
   459→    # Type message with human-like timing
   460→    # For longer messages, use fill() to avoid timeout, then add small delay
   461→    if len(message) > 50:
   462→        await input_element.fill(message)
   463→    else:
   464→        await input_element.type(message, delay=80)
   465→
   466→    await async_random_delay('action')
   467→
   468→    # Find and click send button
   469→    # Recording confirmed: send button contains text "发送" (span inside button)
   470→    send_selectors = [
   471→        'text="发送"',
   472→        'button:has-text("发送")',
   473→        '[class*="btn-send"]',
   474→        '[class*="send-btn"]',
   475→    ]
   476→
   477→    for selector in send_selectors:
   478→        try:
   479→            btn = await page.query_selector(selector)
   480→            if btn and await btn.is_visible():
   481→                await btn.click()
   482→                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   483→                logger.info("Message sent via send button click")
   484→                return
   485→        except Exception:
   486→            continue
   487→
   488→    # Fallback: try pressing Enter to send
   489→    await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
   490→    await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   491→    logger.info("Message sent via Enter key")
   492→
   493→
   494→def _save_message_to_db(
   495→    boss_id: str,
   496→    template_name: str,
   497→    content: str,
   498→    status: str,
   499→    db_manager,
   500→) -> None:
   501→    """Save a message record to the database."""
   502→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   503→        message = Message(
   504→            candidate_boss_id=boss_id,
   505→            template_name=template_name,
   506→            content=content,
   507→            status=status,
   508→            sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == 'sent' else None,
   509→        )
   510→        session.add(message)
   511→

file.content:
"""Message sending module for Boss直聘.

Handles sending templated messages to candidates through Boss直聘's
chat system. Supports single and batch message sending with
human confirmation and rate limiting.

Boss直聘 chat flow:
1. From search page (/web/chat/search), click "搜索畅聊卡" button
2. Click "查看对话" to open the chat window
3. Type message in #boss-chat-global-input
4. Click "发送" button
5. Close chat via div.iboss.iboss-close

Key differences from Maimai:
- Boss直聘 uses "搜索畅聊卡" as the primary contact action from search
- Chat input is a div with id #boss-chat-global-input (not textarea)
- Chat opens as an overlay on the current page
- Main page URL: /web/chat/search
"""

from datetime import datetime, timezone
from typing import Dict, List, Optional

from patchright.async_api import Page
from loguru import logger
from rich.console import Console
from rich.panel import Panel

import questionary

from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
from src.utils.config import get_config
from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
from src.utils.validators import validate_template_variables
from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
from src.exceptions.errors import (
    BrowserError,
    PermanentFailureError,
    SelectorNotFoundError,
)

console = Console()


def render_template(template: Dict, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
    """
    Render a message template with variable substitution.

    Uses a single-pass approach to avoid recursive replacement issues
    (e.g., variable values containing {other_var} patterns).

    Args:
        template: Template dict with 'content' and 'variables' keys
        variables: Variable name-value pairs

    Returns:
        Rendered message string
    """
    import re

    content = template['content']

    def replacer(match):
        var_name = match.group(1)
        if var_name in variables:
            return str(variables[var_name])
        return match.group(0)  # Keep original if no matching variable

    content = re.sub(r'\{(\w+)\}', replacer, content)
    return content


async def send_message(
    boss_id: str,
    template_name: str,
    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
    preview_only: bool = False,
    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
) -> bool:
    """
    Send a templated message to a candidate on Boss直聘.

    Args:
        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
        template_name: Name of the message template
        variables: Template variable overrides
        preview_only: If True, only preview the message without sending
        browser: Browser manager instance

    Returns:
        True if message sent successfully
    """
    if browser is None:
        browser = get_browser_manager()

    page = browser.page
    if not page:
        page = await browser.start()

    config = get_config()
    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
    db_manager = get_db_manager()

    # Load template
    template = config.get_template(template_name)

    # Merge variables
    final_vars = dict(variables or {})

    # Try to fill candidate info from database
    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
        if candidate:
            if 'name' not in final_vars and candidate.name:
                final_vars['name'] = candidate.name
            if 'company' not in final_vars and candidate.company:
                final_vars['company'] = candidate.company
            if 'position' not in final_vars and candidate.title:
                final_vars['position'] = candidate.title

    # Validate variables
    validate_template_variables(template, final_vars)

    # Render message
    message_content = render_template(template, final_vars)

    # Preview
    console.print(Panel(
        f"[bold]To:[/bold] {boss_id}\n"
        f"[bold]Template:[/bold] {template_name}\n"
        f"[bold]Message:[/bold]\n{message_content}",
        title="Message Preview",
        border_style="cyan"
    ))

    if preview_only:
        console.print("[dim]Preview only — message not sent.[/dim]")
        return False

    # Confirm send
    confirm = questionary.confirm(
        "Send this message?",
        default=False,
    ).ask()

    if not confirm:
        console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled.[/yellow]")
        # Record cancellation
        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'cancelled', db_manager)
        return False

    # Rate limit check
    await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')

    try:
        # Navigate to chat with the candidate
        success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
        if not success:
            raise BrowserError(f"Failed to open chat with {boss_id}")

        # Type and send the message
        await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)

        # Log success
        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id, 'template': template_name})
        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)

        console.print(f"[green]Message sent to {boss_id}![/green]")
        return True

    except PermanentFailureError as e:
        logger.error(f"Permanent failure sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
        console.print(f"[red]Failed to send: {e}[/red]")
        return False
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error sending message to {boss_id}: {e}")
        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
        return False


async def send_message_batch(
    candidates: list,
    template_name: str,
    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
    interactive: bool = True,
    skip_messaged: bool = True,
    dry_run: bool = False,
    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
) -> Dict[str, int]:
    """
    Send messages to multiple candidates.

    Args:
        candidates: List of CandidateBasic or dicts with boss_id
        template_name: Template name
        variables: Shared template variables
        interactive: Confirm each message individually
        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged
        dry_run: Simulate without actually sending
        browser: Browser manager instance

    Returns:
        Dict with counts: sent, failed, skipped, cancelled
    """
    if browser is None:
        browser = get_browser_manager()

    config = get_config()
    db_manager = get_db_manager()
    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()

    stats = {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}

    for i, candidate in enumerate(candidates):
        if isinstance(candidate, dict):
            boss_id = candidate.get('boss_id', '')
            name = candidate.get('name', '')
            title = candidate.get('title', '')
            company = candidate.get('company', '')
        else:
            boss_id = getattr(candidate, 'boss_id', '')
            name = getattr(candidate, 'name', '')
            title = getattr(candidate, 'title', '')
            company = getattr(candidate, 'company', '')

        if not boss_id:
            stats['skipped'] += 1
            continue

        console.print(f"\n[cyan]({i+1}/{len(candidates)})[/cyan] {name} - {title} @ {company}")

        # Check if already messaged
        if skip_messaged:
            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
                    candidate_boss_id=boss_id, status='sent'
                ).first()
                if existing_msg:
                    console.print(f"  [dim]Already messaged, skipping[/dim]")
                    stats['skipped'] += 1
                    continue

        if dry_run:
            console.print(f"  [dim]Dry run — would send '{template_name}' template[/dim]")
            stats['sent'] += 1
            continue

        # Build per-candidate variables
        per_vars = dict(variables or {})
        if name:
            per_vars.setdefault('name', name)
        if company:
            per_vars.setdefault('company', company)
        if title:
            per_vars.setdefault('position', title)

        try:
            if interactive:
                # Use single send (with preview + confirmation)
                result = await send_message(
                    boss_id=boss_id,
                    template_name=template_name,
                    variables=per_vars,
                    browser=browser,
                )
                if result:
                    stats['sent'] += 1
                else:
                    stats['cancelled'] += 1
            else:
                # Non-interactive: send without confirmation
                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')

                template = config.get_template(template_name)
                validate_template_variables(template, per_vars)
                message_content = render_template(template, per_vars)

                page = browser.page
                success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
                if success:
                    await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
                    rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id})
                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
                    stats['sent'] += 1
                    console.print(f"  [green]Sent![/green]")
                else:
                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
                    stats['failed'] += 1
                    console.print(f"  [red]Failed to open chat[/red]")

        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
            stats['failed'] += 1
            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")

        # Delay between messages
        if i < len(candidates) - 1:
            await async_random_delay('message')

    # Summary
    console.print(Panel(
        f"[green]Sent: {stats['sent']}[/green] | "
        f"[red]Failed: {stats['failed']}[/red] | "
        f"[yellow]Skipped: {stats['skipped']}[/yellow] | "
        f"[dim]Cancelled: {stats['cancelled']}[/dim]",
        title="Batch Message Summary",
    ))

    return stats


async def _navigate_to_chat(page: Page, boss_id: str, db_manager) -> bool:
    """
    Navigate to the chat window for a candidate.

    Tries multiple strategies:
    1. Direct chat URL (if known)
    2. Navigate to candidate profile and click "立即沟通"
    3. Search in existing conversations

    Args:
        page: Playwright page instance
        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID
        db_manager: Database manager

    Returns:
        True if chat window is ready
    """
    encrypt_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id

    # Get profile URL from database
    profile_url = None
    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
        if candidate and candidate.profile_url:
            profile_url = candidate.profile_url

    # Strategy 1: Navigate to profile and click chat button
    if profile_url:
        try:
            await page.goto(profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
            await async_random_delay('page_load')
            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)

            # Look for "立即沟通" button
            chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
            if chat_button:
                await chat_button.click()
                await async_random_delay('action')
                # Wait for chat to load
                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
                return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.warning(f"Strategy 1 (profile click) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")

    # Strategy 2: Try direct geek URL
    try:
        geek_url = f"https://www.zhipin.com/web/geek/{encrypt_id}"
        await page.goto(geek_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
        await async_random_delay('page_load')
        await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)

        chat_button = await _find_chat_button(page)
        if chat_button:
            await chat_button.click()
            await async_random_delay('action')
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            return True
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning(f"Strategy 2 (direct geek URL) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")

    # Strategy 3: Try to find a chat link on the current page
    try:
        # Check if there's a chat link on the current page
        chat_link = await page.query_selector(
            'a[href*="chat"], a[href*="im"], [class*="chat-link"]'
        )
        if chat_link:
            await chat_link.click()
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            return True
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning(f"Strategy 3 (chat link) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")

    logger.error(f"All chat navigation strategies failed for {boss_id}")
    return False


async def _find_chat_button(page: Page):
    """Find the chat/communication button on the page."""
    selectors = [
        'button:has-text("搜索畅聊卡")',
        'button:has-text("立即沟通")',
        'a:has-text("立即沟通")',
        'button:has-text("开始沟通")',
        'button:has-text("继续沟通")',
        '[class*="btn-chat"]',
        '[class*="chat-btn"]',
    ]

    for selector in selectors:
        try:
            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
            if element and await element.is_visible():
                return element
        except Exception:
            continue

    return None


async def _type_and_send_message(page: Page, message: str) -> None:
    """
    Type a message into the chat input and send it.

    Args:
        page: Playwright page instance
        message: Message text to send
    """
    # Find the message input
    # Recording confirmed: #boss-chat-global-input is the primary chat input (a div element)
    input_selectors = [
        '#boss-chat-global-input',
        '[contenteditable="true"]',
        '[class*="chat-input"] textarea',
        '[class*="input-area"] textarea',
        'textarea[class*="message"]',
        'textarea',
    ]

    input_element = None
    for selector in input_selectors:
        try:
            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
            if element and await element.is_visible():
                input_element = element
                break
        except Exception:
            continue

    if not input_element:
        raise SelectorNotFoundError("Chat message input not found")

    # Click to focus
    await input_element.click()
    await page.wait_for_timeout(300)

    # Clear any existing content (use Meta+a on macOS, Control+a elsewhere)
    import sys
    select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
    await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
    await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
    await page.wait_for_timeout(200)

    # Type message with human-like timing
    # For longer messages, use fill() to avoid timeout, then add small delay
    if len(message) > 50:
        await input_element.fill(message)
    else:
        await input_element.type(message, delay=80)

    await async_random_delay('action')

    # Find and click send button
    # Recording confirmed: send button contains text "发送" (span inside button)
    send_selectors = [
        'text="发送"',
        'button:has-text("发送")',
        '[class*="btn-send"]',
        '[class*="send-btn"]',
    ]

    for selector in send_selectors:
        try:
            btn = await page.query_selector(selector)
            if btn and await btn.is_visible():
                await btn.click()
                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
                logger.info("Message sent via send button click")
                return
        except Exception:
            continue

    # Fallback: try pressing Enter to send
    await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
    await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
    logger.info("Message sent via Enter key")


def _save_message_to_db(
    boss_id: str,
    template_name: str,
    content: str,
    status: str,
    db_manager,
) -> None:
    """Save a message record to the database."""
    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
        message = Message(
            candidate_boss_id=boss_id,
            template_name=template_name,
            content=content,
            status=status,
            sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == 'sent' else None,
        )
        session.add(message)
